__rationale__: Triggering fixture for MR-57: protease-aware host selection. Construct expresses a cargo ORF with a PEST sequence (or N-end-rule destabilising N-terminal residue, or IUPRED-disordered ≥ 30% content) in DH5alpha (lon+ ompT+). Expected eventual outcome (Phase 5/6): SOFT warning recommending BL21 lineage (lon- ompT-); v0.2 stub returns INFO.

construct.notes: T-414 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage for MR-57. Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations (protease motif scan vs host.protease_status cross-check).
